prompt_messages.content: You are a weak conditional verifier for an existing expert mechanism graph. Return only valid JSON. Do not propose new graph edges. Do not assert causal truth. Your output is only a conditional gate feature that downstream data, residual, validation, and reliability admission may reject.

For each selected existing expert edge, decide whether it should be conditionally activated, suppressed, or left uncertain under class, operating regime, residual, and temporal patterns. Use only expert_edge_id values from current_expert_graph_edges. Do not add new source-target pairs. Prefer specific, falsifiable conditions that can be checked by time-series residual/data support. JSON input:
{"dataset": "skab", "target": "anomaly", "task": "binary point/run anomaly detection", "allowed_features": ["Accelerometer1RMS", "Accelerometer2RMS", "Current", "Pressure", "Temperature", "Thermocouple", "Voltage", "Volume Flow RateRMS"], "feature_catalog": [{"name": "Accelerometer1RMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "mechanical_vibration", "n_unique": 31964}, {"name": "Accelerometer2RMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "mechanical_vibration", "n_unique": 35252}, {"name": "Current", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "electrical_drive", "n_unique": 42271}, {"name": "Pressure", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "hydraulic_flow", "n_unique": 10}, {"name": "Temperature", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "thermal", "n_unique": 37593}, {"name": "Thermocouple", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "thermal", "n_unique": 24917}, {"name": "Voltage", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "electrical_drive", "n_unique": 26895}, {"name": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "hydraulic_flow", "n_unique": 1994}], "current_expert_graph_edges": [{"edge_id": "skab_000_Current_Temperature", "source": "Current", "target": "Temperature", "relation": "motor_load_heating", "lag": 2, "reliability": 0.45, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_001_Voltage_Current", "source": "Voltage", "target": "Current", "relation": "drive_electrical_response", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.35, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_002_Volume_Flow_RateRMS_Pressure", "source": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "target": "Pressure", "relation": "flow_pressure_coupling", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.45, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_003_Pressure_Volume_Flow_RateRMS", "source": "Pressure", "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "relation": "hydraulic_feedback", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.35, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_004_Accelerometer1RMS_Volume_Flow_RateRMS", "source": "Accelerometer1RMS", "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "relation": "mechanical_vibration_flow", "lag": 2, "reliability": 0.3, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_005_Temperature_Thermocouple", "source": "Temperature", "target": "Thermocouple", "relation": "thermal_transfer", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.42, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}], "max_verifications": 8, "required_json_schema": {"verifications": [{"expert_edge_id": "existing expert edge id from current_expert_graph_edges", "source": "source feature from that expert edge", "target": "target feature from that expert edge", "activation": "activate|suppress|uncertain", "activation_score": "float 0.0 to 1.0; conditional edge activation strength", "confidence": "float 0.0 to 0.70; LLM is weak evidence only", "class_scope": ["all or dataset class/fault names where this condition may hold"], "regime_scope": ["all or operating/degradation regimes where this condition may hold"], "residual_pattern": "short condition on residual or co-activation pattern", "temporal_pattern": "short condition on lag, spike, drift, or persistence pattern", "rationale": "one short falsifiable mechanism sentence"}]}}

raw_response:
{
  "verifications": [
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_000_Current_Temperature",
      "source": "Current",
      "target": "Temperature",
      "activation": "activate",
      "activation_score": 0.58,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "class_scope": [
        "all"
      ],
      "regime_scope": [
        "non-steady or elevated-load regimes with persistent Current residual support"
      ],
      "residual_pattern": "activate when positive Current residuals co-occur with later positive Temperature residuals; suppress if Temperature residuals lead or are isolated",
      "temporal_pattern": "Current residual elevation persists for at least 2 samples and Temperature rises near lag 2 or as a short drift",
      "rationale": "A sustained electrical-load residual can be checked for a lagged thermal residual response."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_001_Voltage_Current",
      "source": "Voltage",
      "target": "Current",
      "activation": "uncertain",
      "activation_score": 0.32,
      "confidence": 0.38,
      "class_scope": [
        "all"
      ],
      "regime_scope": [
        "electrical transients; not steady regulated-voltage periods"
      ],
      "residual_pattern": "leave uncertain unless Voltage residual excursions repeatedly precede Current residual excursions at lag 1 with stable sign or magnitude relation",
      "temporal_pattern": "short spike or step in Voltage followed by Current change within 1 sample",
      "rationale": "A regulated drive may weaken direct Voltage-to-Current residual predictability, so lagged support is required."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_002_Volume_Flow_RateRMS_Pressure",
      "source": "Volume Flow RateRMS",
      "target": "Pressure",
      "activation": "activate",
      "activation_score": 0.56,
      "confidence": 0.52,
      "class_scope": [
        "all"
      ],
      "regime_scope": [
        "hydraulic-flow transients or abnormal flow excursions"
      ],
      "residual_pattern": "activate when Volume Flow RateRMS residual shifts are followed by Pressure residual level changes; suppress during constant quantized Pressure plateaus without flow support",
      "temporal_pattern": "flow spike or step precedes a Pressure step at lag 0 to 1",
      "rationale": "Flow residual changes can be tested for near-lagged pressure-level responses."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_003_Pressure_Volume_Flow_RateRMS",
      "source": "Pressure",
      "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS",
      "activation": "uncertain",
      "activation_score": 0.34,
      "confidence": 0.36,
      "class_scope": [
        "all"
      ],
      "regime_scope": [
        "hydraulic feedback or control-correction intervals"
      ],
      "residual_pattern": "leave uncertain unless Pressure step residuals precede compensating Volume Flow RateRMS residual changes at lag 1",
      "temporal_pattern": "quantized Pressure step followed by flow RMS adjustment within 1 sample",
      "rationale": "Pressure-to-flow feedback is plausible only if discrete pressure residual changes consistently lead flow residual changes."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_004_Accelerometer1RMS_Volume_Flow_RateRMS",
      "source": "Accelerometer1RMS",
      "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS",
      "activation": "suppress",
      "activation_score": 0.22,
      "confidence": 0.34,
      "class_scope": [
        "all"
      ],
      "regime_scope": [
        "steady operation or vibration-only excursions without hydraulic residual support"
      ],
      "residual_pattern": "suppress when Accelerometer1RMS residual spikes are not followed by Volume Flow RateRMS residual changes; reconsider only if repeated lagged co-activation appears",
      "temporal_pattern": "isolated vibration spikes with no flow response within about 2 samples",
      "rationale": "A vibration-to-flow gate should be disabled when mechanical residual spikes lack lagged hydraulic residual support."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_005_Temperature_Thermocouple",
      "source": "Temperature",
      "target": "Thermocouple",
      "activation": "activate",
      "activation_score": 0.57,
      "confidence": 0.54,
      "class_scope": [
        "all"
      ],
      "regime_scope": [
        "thermal drift, heating, or cooling intervals"
      ],
      "residual_pattern": "activate when Temperature residual drift is followed by same-direction Thermocouple residual drift; suppress if Thermocouple changes independently",
      "temporal_pattern": "Temperature change leads Thermocouple change by about 1 sample with persistence over multiple samples",
      "rationale": "Coupled thermal sensors can be checked for same-direction lagged residual drift."
    }
  ]
}

regime_scope: non-steady or elevated-load regimes with persistent Current residual support
verifications.residual_pattern: activate when positive Current residuals co-occur with later positive Temperature residuals; suppress if Temperature residuals lead or are isolated
verifications.temporal_pattern: Current residual elevation persists for at least 2 samples and Temperature rises near lag 2 or as a short drift
verifications.rationale: A sustained electrical-load residual can be checked for a lagged thermal residual response.

regime_scope: electrical transients; not steady regulated-voltage periods
verifications.residual_pattern: leave uncertain unless Voltage residual excursions repeatedly precede Current residual excursions at lag 1 with stable sign or magnitude relation
verifications.temporal_pattern: short spike or step in Voltage followed by Current change within 1 sample
verifications.rationale: A regulated drive may weaken direct Voltage-to-Current residual predictability, so lagged support is required.

regime_scope: hydraulic-flow transients or abnormal flow excursions
verifications.residual_pattern: activate when Volume Flow RateRMS residual shifts are followed by Pressure residual level changes; suppress during constant quantized Pressure plateaus without flow support
verifications.temporal_pattern: flow spike or step precedes a Pressure step at lag 0 to 1
verifications.rationale: Flow residual changes can be tested for near-lagged pressure-level responses.

verifications.residual_pattern: leave uncertain unless Pressure step residuals precede compensating Volume Flow RateRMS residual changes at lag 1
verifications.temporal_pattern: quantized Pressure step followed by flow RMS adjustment within 1 sample
verifications.rationale: Pressure-to-flow feedback is plausible only if discrete pressure residual changes consistently lead flow residual changes.

regime_scope: steady operation or vibration-only excursions without hydraulic residual support
verifications.residual_pattern: suppress when Accelerometer1RMS residual spikes are not followed by Volume Flow RateRMS residual changes; reconsider only if repeated lagged co-activation appears
verifications.temporal_pattern: isolated vibration spikes with no flow response within about 2 samples
verifications.rationale: A vibration-to-flow gate should be disabled when mechanical residual spikes lack lagged hydraulic residual support.

regime_scope: thermal drift, heating, or cooling intervals
verifications.residual_pattern: activate when Temperature residual drift is followed by same-direction Thermocouple residual drift; suppress if Thermocouple changes independently
verifications.temporal_pattern: Temperature change leads Thermocouple change by about 1 sample with persistence over multiple samples
verifications.rationale: Coupled thermal sensors can be checked for same-direction lagged residual drift.
